title: WT_NI_2
treatment_protocol_ch1: THP-1 monocytes were differentiated with 100 ng/ml phorbol ester 13-phorbol-12-myristate acetate (PMA) for 72 h.
treatment_protocol_ch1.1: THP-1 cells were infected with Mtb mc26206 growing in log-phase at a multiplicity of infection (MOI) of 10 for 16 h. Extracellular, non-phagocytosed bacteria were removed by three phosphate buffered saline (PBS) washes. Infection was continued at 37°C for a total infection time of 48 h.
growth_protocol_ch1: RPMI 1640, 10% heat-inactivated fetal bovine serum, 2 mM glutamine, 10 mM HEPES, 100 I.U./ml  penicillin, μg/ml streptomycin  Cells were cultured at 37°C at 5% CO2.
extract_protocol_ch1: RNA was harvested using Aurum™ Total RNA Mini Kit (Bio-Rad) as per the manufacturer’s protocols. All samples were incubated in lysis buffer for 20 minutes to inactivate bacteria in Mtb-infected samples.
extract_protocol_ch1.1: cDNA libraries were generated from mRNA samples with the NEB Ultra II Directional polyA mRNA library prep kit for Illumina.
data_processing: RNA-seq sequence reads were trimmed using fastp v0.20.1 with the parameters --length_required 25,  --cut_tail, cut_tail_window_size 4, --cut_tail_mean_quality 20, --disable_quality_filtering, --overrepresentation_analysis
data_processing.1: Filtered reads were aligned to the human hg38 genome using STAR v2.7.5a, with the parameters --outReadsUnmapped Fastx, --outFilterMatchNminOverLread 0.50, --outFilterScoreMinOverLread 0.50 --outSAMmapqUnique 40, --outFilterMultimapNmax 1 and duplicate reads were marked with Picard  (Picard Tools).
data_processing.2: Subread featureCounts was used to assign reads to gene exons and to summarize counts at the gene level. Represented genes were annotated using biomaRt.
data_processing.4: Supplementary files format and content: RNA-seq read counts over exons and summarized over genes
